properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for JWT tokens. Must be at least 32 characters. Set via the JWT_SECRET environment variable. The application will refuse to start if this is missing, blank, or a known placeholder value.

properties.name: jwt.access-token-expiration
properties.description: Access token expiration in milliseconds. Default: 3600000 (1 hour).

properties.name: jwt.refresh-token-expiration
properties.description: Refresh token expiration in milliseconds. Default: 86400000 (24 hours).

properties.name: jwt.issuer
properties.description: Value placed in the JWT 'iss' (issuer) claim.
